summary: Verified color swatches bug fix. Collections now correctly show colors extracted from product names when DB color field is empty. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: Color swatches render correctly with proper labels and COLOUR/COLOURS pluralization.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing products in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Color swatches fix verified. Key test collections: Opaco (White/Grey from name extraction), Testseries (White/Grey from name), Bluestone (Grey/Beige/White from DB color field), Sparkle (Cream/Grey/White from name extraction). The fix adds extract_color_from_name() and get_product_color() functions in backend tiles.py that mirror frontend CollectionDetailPage logic. Two-pass approach ensures color entries appear FIRST in product_images array.

backend_api: ✓ GET /api/tiles/collections returns color_swatches with colors extracted from product names
✓ product_images array has color entries BEFORE non-color entries (prioritization working)
✓ additional_colors count is based on color_swatches length not total colors
✓ Opaco collection shows White/Grey extracted from product names like 'Opaco White 60x60cm Matt'
✓ Bluestone collection shows Grey/Beige/White from DB color field
✓ Sparkle collection shows Cream/Grey/White from name extraction
✓ Testseries collection shows White/Grey from name extraction
✓ Color swatches have required fields: color, hex, image, product_slug
frontend_ui: ✓ Collection cards render color swatches correctly
✓ Swatch labels show extracted color names (White, Grey, Cream, etc.)
✓ COLOUR/COLOURS pluralization badge shows correctly (1 COLOUR vs 2 COLOURS)
✓ Non-color entries (sizes) appear after color entries in swatches
✓ Bluestone card shows 3 COLOURS badge with Grey/Beige/White swatches
✓ Opaco card shows 2 COLOURS badge with White/Grey swatches

scenario_1_name_extraction.products: Opaco White 60x60cm Matt, Opaco Grey 60x60cm Matt (no DB color field)
scenario_1_name_extraction.result: PASS - Colors extracted from product names

scenario_2_db_color_field.products: Bluestone Grey 60x60, Bluestone Beige 60x60, Bluestone White 30x60 (have DB color field)
scenario_2_db_color_field.result: PASS - Colors from DB field used

scenario_3_product_images_prioritization.result: PASS - Color entries appear FIRST before non-color entries

scenario_4_additional_colors.result: PASS - All collections have correct additional_colors count

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Collection cards (e.g., Ardesia with 4 colors) only show 2 color swatches
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_1: Many products lack a 'color' DB field but have color info in product names
bug_fix_verification.root_cause_2: product_images array filled with non-color entries first, truncating actual color entries
fix_applied: Added extract_color_from_name() function mirroring frontend CollectionDetailPage logic
Added get_product_color() function to check DB field first, then extract from name
Restructured to two-pass approach: color entries prioritized first in product_images
